title: API Contract Protection & Blast Radius Toolchain
scope: Install a four-layer API contract protection toolchain: drift detection scripts for the Go chi router vs openapi.yaml and for frontend api() callers vs the spec; a version-controlled pre-push hook with a [breaking] escape token; a snapshot + blast radius reporter (npm run api:snap); a Dev panel tab rendering the report on demand; and a stubbed GitHub Actions workflow ready for when a remote is added.
value: Prevents the Go router from silently drifting from the OpenAPI spec, and catches frontend callers referencing undocumented endpoints before they reach production. The breaking-change gate with an explicit [breaking] escape hatch makes intentional breaks visible in git history. The blast radius report gives reviewers a one-glance summary of what changed between spec versions.
implementation_plan: Task 1: check_routes.sh — Go chi router vs openapi.yaml drift detector (Python heredoc parser tracking brace-depth stack for nested r.Route/r.Group/r.Mount blocks).
Task 2: check_callers.py — frontend api()/apiInfra()/apiV2() callers vs spec; side effects: caller-map.json + dead-apis.txt; dead-api-exemptions.txt allow-list.
Task 3: snap_api.sh + initial v1 snapshot — auto-numbers vN, oasdiff changelog → blast-radius-latest.md, CHANGELOG.md row.
Task 4: pre-push.sh + npm scripts — version-controlled hook source (api:snap, api:check, api:install-hooks in package.json); hook not auto-installed.
Task 5: /api/dev/api-changelog Next.js route — reads api-snapshots/* and returns JSON with changelog, caller_map, dead_apis, snapshot_version, snapshot_date.
Task 6: DevApiChangelogPanel + DevPage tab — three sections (Blast Radius, Caller Map filterable table, Dead APIs list); Refresh button; registered in DevPage nav.
Task 7: GitHub Actions workflow stub — api-map + api-protect jobs mirroring pre-push hook; inert until GitHub remote added.
Task 8: docs/c_c_lint_rules.md + README — api:check rule added to lint table; API contract toolchain section in README with oasdiff install + usage.
areas_impacted: Dev toolchain: dev/scripts/check_routes.sh, dev/scripts/check_callers.py, dev/scripts/snap_api.sh, dev/scripts/pre-push.sh
Artefacts: api-snapshots/v1.yaml, caller-map.json, dead-apis.txt, blast-radius-latest.md, CHANGELOG.md
feature_list: check_routes.sh: chi router path reconstruction via Python brace-depth stack parser
check_callers.py: api()/apiInfra()/apiV2() call-site scanner with TS generic support
api-snapshots/: versioned spec snapshots with oasdiff blast-radius reports
pre-push hook: blocks pushes with undocumented routes or breaking changes; [breaking] escape token
Dev panel: API Changelog tab with filterable caller map and dead-API list

acceptance_criteria.criterion: npm run api:check exits 0 with 0 errors (warnings for undocumented spec paths are acceptable)
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Run npm run api:check — check_routes.sh and check_callers.py both exit 0

acceptance_criteria.criterion: api-snapshots/v1.yaml exists and matches openapi.yaml at commit 4d5707b
GET /api/dev/api-changelog returns JSON with snapshot_version: 'v1' and caller_map with >0 entries
Dev panel at /dev shows API Changelog tab rendering caller map and dead-API list
.github/workflows/api-contracts.yml is valid YAML with api-map and api-protect jobs

risks.risk: 7 real spec drift items remain in openapi.yaml (timebox sprints, work-items/bulk, workspace fields, etc.) — pre-push hook will block pushes until these are documented or the hook is not installed
risks.mitigation: Hook is not auto-installed (manual npm run api:install-hooks). Spec drift cleanup is a follow-up task, not a blocker for this plan.

risks.risk: oasdiff package was renamed from github.com/tufin to github.com/oasdiff — any cached install of the old path will silently use the wrong binary
risks.mitigation: All scripts use resolve_oasdiff() with GOPATH fallback and the correct module path is documented in README and lint rules.
